description_long: This is a classic wooden barrel with a slightly bulging cylindrical shape, constructed from vertical wooden staves bound together by three prominent black metal hoops. The wood appears weathered and textured, suggesting durability and exposure to outdoor elements. The top and bottom are flat and made from the same dark wood as the sides, with no visible openings or spouts. The metal bands are evenly spaced, providing structural reinforcement and a rustic aesthetic. There are no visible handles, markings, or labels on the exterior. The overall appearance suggests it is designed for storage or transport of goods in urban or industrial settings.
description: A weathered wooden barrel with black metal hoops, featuring a bulging cylindrical shape and no visible handles or markings.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full face of the barrel with three black metal hoops and textured wooden staves.
description_view_1: Slightly rotated view revealing the curvature of the barrel and the continuity of the metal bands.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, similar to the front, with clear visibility of the wood grain and metal reinforcement.
description_view_3: Another angled view highlighting the seamless construction and the absence of handles or markings.
